title: Viewer controls and SVG interaction
description: Implement 04-engine-api/03-views controls and SVG navigation: controls=true UI, base-view selector, overlay checkboxes, fit/reset buttons, diagnostics indicator, mouse wheel zoom, drag pan, responsive sizing, and state-preserving overlay/view updates.
triage_notes: DONE (Claude): SVG pan/zoom (wheel zoom toward cursor, drag pan) + functional fit()/reset() via src/views/interaction.ts; render(model,{interactive}) attaches it for 2D targets. Viewer controls=true toolbar: base-view selector, overlay checkboxes, fit/reset, diagnostics indicator (wired to setBaseView/toggleOverlay/fit/reset). Verified in browser (pan/zoom transform updates; toolbar + auth overlay render). 95 tests (interaction fit-math unit tests added). Remaining/foll-up: responsive re-fit on container resize (ResizeObserver) and 3D fit/reset parity -> TASK-007/009.
